title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow that routes different phases of frontend development to specialized models: Claude Opus for planning and reasoning, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design. This composition approach leverages model strengths rather than picking a single model, with integration layers provided through tools like Pi and Archon.
